name: Punjabi Musical Group (Lahore)
body: The following recordings are of the Punjabi Musical Group from Lahore during their visit to Malaysia. This group consisted of one of Ustad Mehdi Hassan’s students, Ashiq Hussain and Kaneez Reshma, the younger sister of Pakistani folk singer, Reshma. Unfotunately, we do not have any more details about the group or the date of the recording. If anyone has more information or recordings of theirs to share, please contact us. Thank you.
